title: Pvp Tweaks
description: A vanilla style texture pack focused on useful improvements for PvP,  cleaner visuals, better visibility, survival, redstone, and everyday gameplay. Features include low fire, animated items, 3D models, redstone indicators
body:
# About
This texture pack is designed to improve visibility, PvP, UHC gameplay,Mace, Crystal, SMP and Cart and overall quality of life while still keeping the vanilla feel of Minecraft. It includes many small tweaks and utility changes to make gameplay cleaner, easier to read, and more enjoyable.




## **This texture pack includes:**

• No pumpkin blur
• Low fire overlay
• No explosion particles/effects
• Low shield
• Small bow and crossbow
• Small mace (larger dropped mace model)
• Small steak, golden carrot, and golden apple
• Removed eating particles from those foods
• Low wind charge and mace burst effects

**Visual Improvements:**
• 3D End Crystal
• 3D minecarts
• 3D ladders and rails
• Animated items
• Small animated totem
• Cobweb borders
• See-through scaffolding center
• Brewing recipe guide inside brewing stand UI
• Ore borders for improved visibility

**UHC:**
• Highlighted water sources for easier spotting in UHC

**Redstone Improvements:**
• Directional hoppers
• Sticky piston side indicators
• Redstone signal numbers
• Note block pitch numbers

**Farming & Building Tweaks:**
• Different colored pumpkin and melon stems when fully grown
• Saplings become taller when close to growing

This pack focuses on cleaner visuals, better readability, and useful gameplay improvements without changing the core Minecraft experience.

Credit:palettemc
For animated Items
